rationale: Educ. Code §33.005 governs comprehensive school counseling programs and has no operative relationship to the Tax Code §11.13(b) homestead exemption amount. No conflict arises.
quote: A school counselor shall work with the school faculty and staff, students, parents, and the community to plan, implement, and evaluate a comprehensive school counseling program
_note: The cited rule concerns school counseling programs and is wholly unrelated to the proposed homestead exemption increase. No conflict detected.
